experience.title: Web Development Manager
bullets: Lead and mentor a cross-functional team of web developers, setting technical direction, delivery standards, and code-quality practices across all web application projects.
Own the end-to-end software delivery lifecycle — from requirements and architecture through deployment and post-release support — for secure, mission-critical systems.
Partner with business stakeholders to translate strategic goals into actionable technical roadmaps, prioritized backlogs, and measurable delivery milestones.
Drive adoption of modern web technologies and engineering best practices, including CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and structured code reviews.
Oversee Azure cloud infrastructure, release management, and application security, championing best practices for remediation and compliance.
Manage resourcing, hiring, and performance development to build a high-performing, collaborative engineering team.

experience.title: Lead Developer
bullets: Streamlined the implementation of a security-confidential Azure cloud environment within a highly collaborative operations team, introducing best practices for remediation.
Set up and configured Microsoft Azure and AWS cloud computing platform components.
Created code drops and patches for deployment across pre-production and production environments within secure systems.
Coordinated with external teams and stakeholders to assess the impact of changes and complete release work.
Performed code-merge activities across multiple ASP.NET C# applications.
Supported developers with troubleshooting and technical issues, and led project risk and issue identification and management.
Analyzed functional requirements and delivered design solutions using the latest .NET framework with MS SQL Server.
